mapper.select: select bs.id, bs.name, bs.phone, bs.email, bs.logo, bs.description, bs.category_id, bs.status, bs.updated_time, bs.created_time, bs.last_login_time, ca.name categoryName, ba.province_id, ba.city_id, ba.district_id, ba.detailed_address, (select round(avg(br.score), 1) from business_rating br where br.business_id = bs.id) ratting FROM business bs LEFT JOIN category ca ON bs.category_id = ca.id LEFT JOIN business_address ba ON bs.id = ba.business_id WHERE bs.id = #{id}
